0101110100010010 0101011000011101 0 -> sum: 1011001100101111, cout: 0
0110110110111111 1001000000111011 0 -> sum: 1111110111111010, cout: 0

0111101001000100 0001001000111110 1 -> sum: 1000110010000011, cout: 0
1001010001100010 1101101101001000 0 -> sum: 0110111110101010, cout: 1

1111111111111111 1111111111111111 1 -> sum: 1111111111111111, cout: 1
0000000000000000 1111111111111111 0 -> sum: 1111111111111111, cout: 0
